title: M's Redstone Pack
description: A redstone resource pack that attempts to make redstone components clear while maintaining the vanilla feel.
body:
This pack attempts to make all redstone components clearly readable from all sides while still fitting the vanilla feel, mostly inspired by the Crafter's texture.





**Full Feature List:**


**Redstone:**

All Redstone can now be changed to Bluestone, accessible with [resPackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)

Hoppers - have doors on the top that close when locked

Pistons - are visibly sticky from all sides, have their bedrock edition model

Droppers and Dispensers - close their mouths when not firing(inspired by the ghast), have crafter inspired switches on the sides

Levers - have grooves on the side that show power

Observers - do the rock eyebrow raise meme

Cauldrons - show visible heating, freezing, or condensation on the sides

Composters - visible compost level from the side

Note Blocks - have screens that indicate their instrument and note, have lights that indicate power

Target Blocks - light up a different amount depending on power level

Daylight Detector - blue on the sides when night mode



**Mobs:**

All mobs now visually show the damage they've taken. 



**Dyes:**

Magenta, Lime, Purple, and Pink are now different from Gray



**Dusts:**

Sugar is now a cube, Gunpowder is looser, and Glowstone is more of a paste.



**Tools:**

All tools have been updated to have the color palettes of their corresponding ingots, netherite tools have unique shapes like the armors do, and gold tools are unique.

Most tools will show their damage with different textures at 1/2, 1/4, 1/8, and 1/16 durability.

Bows now have a remade texture with indicators for different pull strength.

End Crystals now have a new model.

_Optifine or CIT Resewn Required_ All enchanted gear has its enchantment glint change depending on the enchantment. Mutually exclusive enchants will always be the one to appear, otherwise the first enchantment listed will render. If any piece of gear has an unobtainable combination of enchants, it will have a rainbow glint.

_Optifine or CIT Resewn Required_ All enchanted books now have their strap and buckle change to reflect the item the book works on and the level respectively. They are as follows:


Yellow Strap - Armor

Blue Strap - Sword

Green Strap - Tools

White Strap - General

Default Red Strap - Bow

Magenta Strap - Fishing

Cyan Strap - Trident

Missing Texture - Modded/Unrecognized


Diamond Buckle - Max Level, regardless of what that max level is

Emerald Buckle - 4

Gold Buckle - 3

Iron Buckle - 2

No Buckle - 1


**World:**

Grass and other simmilar blocks will now have the grass go all the way down the side of the block.

_Optifine or Continuity Required_ All grass blocks will also leak some of their grass onto the dirt block below.

**GUI:**
All GUIs have been changed to a darker, smoother look reminiscent of the Essentials mod.


**Coming Soon:**



- Retextured HUD

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/ For some of the block models and blockstate files.
